title: Rainbow Veggie Delight
description: A colorful and delicious dish made with mixed rainbow vegetables and a hint of smokiness.

ingredients.name: Rainbow Vegetables
ingredients.notes: Mixed bell peppers, carrots, and broccoli

instructions: Cut the rainbow vegetables into bite-sized pieces
Place the vegetables on a baking sheet and drizzle with smoke seasoning
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the vegetables are tender
